name: Genshin Underwater AU
description:
Mermaid yaaay!!!

The Teyvat Ocean is a boundless, bioluminescent realm where the seven elements flow as powerful currents beneath the waves. This underwater expanse is as diverse and treacherous as the world above.

Includes all characters (as of 26.04.2026). Have a good game!

art by FridaynightCat
creator: Ametuct
